archetype: Archetype 2 (Performance Pro) mixed with Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon)
aesthetic: Cyberpunk-meets-military-grade-security, high-tech tactical command center. Rigid grids, stark contrast, glowing indicators over deep void backgrounds.

rules: Use Space Grotesk for all major headings and mode titles.
Use Inter for descriptions and settings.
Use JetBrains Mono for IP addresses, MAC addresses, connection coordinates, logs, and live data feeds.
All overlines and data labels must be Uppercase + Wide Spacing.

spacing_layout.grid_system: Strict bento-box 'Control Room' grid layout for dashboards. Avoid rounded soft bubbles; prefer hard-edged rectangles or minimal 4px border-radius.
rules: Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6) to prevent text collision.
Every pixel utilized in the dashboard. Use h-full on children.
Optical alignment over geometrical for tactical crosshairs or icons next to text.

buttons.agent_primary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#00F0FF] text-[#00F0FF] hover:bg-[#00F0FF]/10 transition-colors uppercase tracking-widest font-bold
buttons.master_primary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#B026FF] text-[#B026FF] hover:bg-[#B026FF]/10 transition-colors uppercase tracking-widest font-bold

motion_interactions.radar_sweep: Use a rotating conic-gradient mask for radar scanning effect in Agent mode.
motion_interactions.pulse: Active nodes and connection statuses MUST pulse gently (opacity 0.5 to 1).
motion_interactions.glitch: Apply subtle CSS glitch effects on hover for primary CTAs or during role switching to emphasize the 'tactical cyber' theme.
motion_interactions.hover: Hover states must explicitly set text color and lighten the background slightly. E.g. hover:bg-[#1A1A24] hover:text-white

icons.library: @expo/vector-icons (Ionicons, MaterialCommunityIcons, Feather) for Expo, or lucide-react if building Web MVP.
icons.style: Use sharp, unrounded variants where possible (e.g., Ionicons 'sharp' variants). Focus on crosshairs, shields, radar, network nodes, and server stacks.
icons.sizing: Dashboards use dense icon sizing (16px - 20px). Hero actions use 24px - 32px.

image_urls.description: Glowing blue and purple lines against a dark background. Perfect for the splash screen or mandatory mode selection background to represent the mesh network.
Abstract digital artwork featuring futuristic cubes with glowing neon lights. Use as a subtle header background for the Master Dashboard.

media.guidelines: Overlay images heavily with bg-[#0A0A0F]/80 to ensure terminal/data text remains highly legible against the background. Do NOT use placeholder images.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements, buttons, and mode selectors MUST have a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, role-based. e.g., data-testid='select-agent-mode-btn', data-testid='sensor-toggle-audio'.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a mobile app UI, but you are building the React/HTML MVP. Structure it with a mobile viewport container (max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen) if deployed on web.
Do NOT use pure white or generic blue. Follow the Agent (Cyan) and Master (Purple) strict color split.
Apply 'font-mono' to all metric numbers, coordinates, and system logs to enforce the military-tactical look.
The Mode Selection screen should be a 50/50 split or dual-card layout highlighting the Cyan vs Purple contrast.
Never use Shadcn's default 'rounded-xl' soft look. Override all radii to 'rounded-sm' or 'rounded-none' for a hardware/terminal aesthetic.
